title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Raizo, Unknown person #3, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #4 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kawa- Matsu!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The voice of a Comrade... an unexpected reunion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is it really you....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you were alive all this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess eating rotten fish for 13 years DID pay off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let me see your face, Kawa- MatsU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't. I'm chained up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: When is the final battle?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I like the sound of that...!! I'm ready to fight anytime!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before that... my apologies, Ra120... but could you get me out of here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course!! I'll try my best!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do I need in order to free you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you will need to find the key to this cell and the key to my handcuffs. al- though... this door is so rusted that I'm not sure it'll even open that way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone is standing in front of the long-locked cell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's the guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Master Solitaire!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the key thief that was in the executive tower!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Do NOT let him escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This isn't good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Smoke- screen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He vanished!!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: So he really is a Ninja!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Find him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right... they can deal with the key thief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You lot, bring that thing over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're going to begin the execution...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OF THESE TWO IDIOTS...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: QUEEN'S PERFORMING HIS MECHANICAL SHOW, LIVE AND IN PERSON!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TODAY, WE SHALL HAVE A GREAT SUMO INFERNO TOURNAMENT!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Sumo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Since we put that collar on you~]

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want you to imagine that you're this stone pillar.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that collar leaves the boundaries of this Sumo wrestling ring...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHOAAA AAAAA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Talons will fly out from the inside***

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and your head will be blown off in an instant!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammit, this is just like the thing those celestial dragons had!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And of course, it's designed so that you can't take it off on your own, so give up already!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
